protein_name: Blocks the elongation and depolymerization of the actin filaments at the pointed end. The Tmod/TM complex contributes to the formation of the short actin protofilament, which in turn defines the geometry of the membrane skeleton. Belongs to the tropomodulin family. Highly expressed in skeletal muscle. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: actin binding; protein binding; tropomyosin binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: actin filament organization; muscle contraction; myofibril assembly; pointed-end actin filament capping
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: actin-capping protein; DKFZp779I0852; Sk-Tmod; Skeletal muscle tropomodulin; skeletal tropomodulin; TMOD4; tropomodulin 4; tropomodulin 4 (muscle); Tropomodulin-4
